content.problemStatement:
A robot moves in a plane starting from point (0, 0). The robot can perform three types of moves:


'G': Go one unit forward in current direction
'L': Turn left (90 degrees counter-clockwise)
'R': Turn right (90 degrees clockwise)
Given a sequence of moves, determine if the robot returns to its starting position after executing all moves.


Input Format

The only line of input contains SSS - the string of moves


Output Format

Print "YES" if the robot returns to starting position
Print "NO" otherwise

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
(GLGLGLG):

Initial position: (0,0), facing North
G: (0,1), facing North
L: (0,1), facing West
G: (-1,1), facing West
L: (-1,1), facing South
G: (-1,0), facing South
L: (-1,0), facing East
G: (0,0), facing East
Returns to (0,0), path is Circular
